title: PMS 4ASST MAGNETIC TRAVEL GAMES 24ASST IN DISPLAY BOX
features: Play Anywhere with the Travel Magnetic Games in Compact Case from Ossian
Learn To play Like a Pro on the Go with this High-Quality Magnetic Travel Draughts Set
A set of four individually boxed magnetic travel games. that will keep the kids busily entertained for hours.
They include Draughts, Chess, Snakes & Ladders, Ludo. Each game comes with a separate case, a dice and all the necessary pieces
This collection of classic, top rated board games helps to teach strategy, concentration, spatial reasoning, and math skills to 6 year olds and up in the most enjoyable way possible.
description: Product Description Magnetic Travel Games 4 Assorted Games A set of four individually boxed magnetic foldable travel games - chess, ludo, snakes and ladders and draughts. Each game comes in an individual folding box and all pieces enclosed together with a dice for each game. It is everything you need to keep your family members entertained for hours on the road. Each box measures approx. when closed 13.5 x 7.5 x 2 cm and 13.5 x 13 x 2 cm when opened. Instructions for each game printed inside the boxes. Safety Warning For external use only.
